## Load a cross-sectional antibody survey data set {.unnumbered}


### Description

Load a cross-sectional antibody survey data set



### Usage

<pre><code class='language-R'>as_pop_data(
  data,
  antigen_isos = NULL,
  age = "Age",
  value = "result",
  id = "index_id",
  standardize = TRUE
)
</code></pre>


### Arguments

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="data">data</code></td>
<td>
a <code>data.frame()</code> or tibble::tbl_df
</td></tr>
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="antigen_isos">antigen_isos</code></td>
<td>
<code>character()</code>
vector of antigen isotypes to be used in analyses
</td></tr>
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="age">age</code></td>
<td>
a <code>character()</code> identifying the age column
</td></tr>
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="value">value</code></td>
<td>
a <code>character()</code> identifying the value column
</td></tr>
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="id">id</code></td>
<td>
a <code>character()</code> identifying the id column
</td></tr>
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="standardize">standardize</code></td>
<td>
a <code>logical()</code> to determine standardization of columns
</td></tr>
</table>


### Value

a <code>pop_data</code> object (a tibble::tbl_df
with extra attribute <code>antigen_isos</code>)



### Examples
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
library("serocalculator")

library(magrittr)
xs_data <-
  serocalculator_example("example_pop_data.csv") |>
  read.csv() |>
  as_pop_data()

print(xs_data)


```
